apps.app_name: Open and transparent management of personal information
findings: Covers: privacy policy. Missing: Missing privacy contact details or complaint process
gaps: Missing privacy contact details or complaint process
recommendations: Add a named privacy contact with phone and email. Include a clear complaint process that mentions the OAIC as escalation.
apps.recommended_language: Add a named privacy contact with phone and email. Include a clear complaint process that mentions the OAIC as escalation.

findings: Not addressed in your policy. You need to add: No statement on anonymous or pseudonymous dealings
gaps: No statement on anonymous or pseudonymous dealings
recommendations: Add a statement about whether customers can interact anonymously. Most businesses in your sector need to verify identity, so explain why.
apps.recommended_language: Add a statement about whether customers can interact anonymously. Most businesses in your sector need to verify identity, so explain why.

findings: Not addressed in your policy. You need to add: No description of what personal information is collected or why
gaps: No description of what personal information is collected or why
recommendations: Document what personal information you collect, why it's necessary for your business, and how you ensure it's accurate.
apps.recommended_language: Document what personal information you collect, why it's necessary for your business, and how you ensure it's accurate.

findings: Not addressed in your policy. You need to add: No process for handling unsolicited personal information
gaps: No process for handling unsolicited personal information
recommendations: Add a section explaining what happens when you receive personal information you didn't ask for.
apps.recommended_language: Add a section explaining what happens when you receive personal information you didn't ask for.

apps.app_name: Notification of the collection of personal information
findings: Not addressed in your policy. You need to add: No collection notice (what you collect, why, who gets it)
gaps: No collection notice (what you collect, why, who gets it)
recommendations: Add a collection notice explaining: what you collect, why, who you share it with, whether it goes overseas, and how to access or correct it.
apps.recommended_language: Add a collection notice explaining: what you collect, why, who you share it with, whether it goes overseas, and how to access or correct it.

apps.app_name: Use or disclosure of personal information
findings: Not addressed in your policy. You need to add: No explanation of how personal information is used or shared
gaps: No explanation of how personal information is used or shared
recommendations: Explain how you use personal information, who you share it with, and under what circumstances. List the types of third parties.
apps.recommended_language: Explain how you use personal information, who you share it with, and under what circumstances. List the types of third parties.

findings: Not addressed in your policy. You need to add: No direct marketing policy or opt-out mechanism
gaps: No direct marketing policy or opt-out mechanism
recommendations: Add a direct marketing section. Explain what marketing you send, how to opt out, and commit to honouring opt-out requests promptly.
apps.recommended_language: Add a direct marketing section. Explain what marketing you send, how to opt out, and commit to honouring opt-out requests promptly.

findings: Not addressed in your policy. You need to add: No disclosure about overseas data transfers
gaps: No disclosure about overseas data transfers
recommendations: Disclose whether personal information is stored or processed overseas. If you use cloud services (almost every business does), this likely applies to you.
apps.recommended_language: Disclose whether personal information is stored or processed overseas. If you use cloud services (almost every business does), this likely applies to you.

apps.app_name: Adoption, use or disclosure of government related identifiers
findings: Not addressed in your policy. You need to add: No policy on handling government identifiers (TFN, licence, Medicare)
gaps: No policy on handling government identifiers (TFN, licence, Medicare)
recommendations: If you collect government IDs (driver's licence for verification, TFN for tax), explain how you protect them and that you don't use them as your customer identifier.
apps.recommended_language: If you collect government IDs (driver's licence for verification, TFN for tax), explain how you protect them and that you don't use them as your customer identifier.

findings: Not addressed in your policy. You need to add: No commitment to data accuracy, currency, or retention
gaps: No commitment to data accuracy, currency, or retention
recommendations: Add commitments to keeping personal information accurate, up-to-date, and relevant. Include a data retention policy.
apps.recommended_language: Add commitments to keeping personal information accurate, up-to-date, and relevant. Include a data retention policy.

findings: Not addressed in your policy. You need to add: No security measures, breach plan, or data disposal process described
gaps: No security measures, breach plan, or data disposal process described
recommendations: Add a security section covering: how you protect data (encryption, access controls), what happens in a breach, and how you dispose of data you no longer need.
apps.recommended_language: Add a security section covering: how you protect data (encryption, access controls), what happens in a breach, and how you dispose of data you no longer need.

findings: Not addressed in your policy. You need to add: No process for individuals to access their personal information
gaps: No process for individuals to access their personal information
recommendations: Add an access rights section. Individuals have the right to request a copy of their personal information. Explain how to make a request and your 30-day response commitment.
apps.recommended_language: Add an access rights section. Individuals have the right to request a copy of their personal information. Explain how to make a request and your 30-day response commitment.

findings: Not addressed in your policy. You need to add: No process for correcting inaccurate personal information
gaps: No process for correcting inaccurate personal information
recommendations: Add a correction section. Individuals can request corrections to inaccurate information. Explain the process and that correction requests are free.
apps.recommended_language: Add a correction section. Individuals can request corrections to inaccurate information. Explain the process and that correction requests are free.

adm_check.recommendation: New rule from 10 December 2026 about automated decision-making.  If you do use automated systems (e.g., credit scoring, eligibility decisions), you'll need to disclose this and offer customers the right to request human review.

next_steps: Week 1-2: Fix critical gaps first: Collection Notice (APP 5), Security (APP 11)
Week 3-4: Address important gaps: Solicited Collection (APP 3), Use & Disclosure (APP 6), Access Rights (APP 12), Correction (APP 13)
Week 5-6: Complete remaining gaps: Anonymity (APP 2), Unsolicited Collection (APP 4), Marketing (APP 7), Overseas Disclosure (APP 8), Government ID (APP 9), Data Quality (APP 10)
Document your security measures: how you store data, who can access it, and your breach response plan
Add a collection notice explaining what you collect, why, and who you share it with
10 Dec 2026: Check if the new automated decision-making transparency rules apply to your business
